channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 Nutlope/hallmark (1972 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Nutlope

📝 Repository: Nutlope/hallmark

📄 Descrizione: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

🍴 Forks: 133

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-27T20:47:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-26T05:36:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 alchaincyf/huashu-md-html (731 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alchaincyf

📝 Repository: alchaincyf/huashu-md-html

📄 Descrizione: md/html 双向流水线 · 三个能力一站式：万物→md / md→精美html / html→md。封装 markitdown + Pandoc + html-to-markdown + trafilatura。4 套反 AI slop 主题。Claude Code skill.

⭐ Stelle: 731

🍴 Forks: 79

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-09T15:34:26Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-04T04:32:37Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 PandoraReads/apex-dashboard (328 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: PandoraReads

📝 Repository: PandoraReads/apex-dashboard

📄 Descrizione: Stop switching between Obsidian notes. One page. Everything you need. Memo your thoughts, crush your todos, track your projects — and make it look incredible doing it.

⭐ Stelle: 328

🍴 Forks: 15

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

🏷️ Topics: dashboard dashboard-templates obsidian obsidian-plugin obsidian-plugins

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-25T05:31:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ab-613/OpenGravity (216 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ab-613

📝 Repository: ab-613/OpenGravity

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct local file system sync and a sidebar agent capable of running commands and editing files. Built in pure HTML/CSS/JS for maximum speed and zero installation.

⭐ Stelle: 216

🍴 Forks: 17

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-11T11:51:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-03T20:13:12Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
